---
title: "AVl / VS-Strätling"
subtitle: "session notes"
# format: |
#      html 
#      - pdf
# tmeta: $testmeta$
# date: '`r format(Sys.time())`'
date: "2026-04-28"
title-meta: ""
format: html
# bibliography: litKI.bib
cmeta: |
  class: [16401] Perspektiven AVL ::
  tutor: strätling ::
  term: SS26
  snc: 16185.1  
#[<< back to online paper <<](https://esteeschwarz.github.io/DC-LX/essais/papers/010/)  
#  arkiv: [<< the anarkkiv lankalevikki worksheet collection >>](https://stschwarz.userpage.fu-berlin.de/links/?title=paperfoot&ref=paper-temp)
arkiv: 16162.tiny
# foot: the anarkkiv lankalevikki worksheet collection >> <https://ada-sub.dh-index.org/blog>
cfoot: |
  [duumy foot collection](https://stschwarz.userpage.fu-berlin.de/links/?title=paperfoot&ref=paper-temp)
---
::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
{{< meta cmeta >}}
:::
{{< include _gitcom.qmd >}} 
::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}

-----

> [AVL Strätling](str-index.qmd) / session notes

-----
:::

```{r,echo=F,eval=T,warning=F}
print("engine on...")
```



# notes
## rhetorik
- pratum ridet: die wiese lacht
  - maybe: bayreuth, prater (auditorium)
  - rasen (golf)
  - rasen: unirasen (eliteunis), der nur best. bzw. professoren allein vorbehalten zu betreten war? some crossed my way, hannah arendt? ingen aning...
